name: Fried Bean Curd with a Sweet & Sour Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1/2 small Red bell pepper, cut into strips
1/2 small Green bell pepper, cut into strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix cornstarch with 3 tablespoons stock.
2. Combine vinegar, sugar, ketchup, soy sauce, salt, cayenne, and black pepper in a bowl.
3. Heat 1 tablespoon oil in a small pot over medium flame.
4. When hot, add garlic and ginger. Stir until the garlic browns.
5. Remove the pot from heat and pour in the vinegar mixture.
6. Return the pot to the heat and bring to a boil. Reduce heat and simmer for 4 minutes.
7. Add the cornstarch mixture. Stir until the sauce thickens. Adjust salt if needed.
8. Remove garlic and ginger.
9. In a bowl, add tofu cubes and mix with salt dissolved in 6 cups of water (bring to a boil first). Pour boiling water over tofu and let sit for a while.
10. Heat vegetable oil in a wok.
11. Add salt, carrot, peppers, and scallions. Stir fry for 30 seconds.
12. Turn off heat.
13. Heat the prepared sauce over low heat.
14. Take tofu out of hot water, squeeze gently to remove excess water, and place on serving platter.
15. Arrange vegetables over tofu and pour sauce over vegetables.
